appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Choose how the console looks. Your choice is saved on this device.

display.title: Display
display.description: Where you land after signing in, and how tightly the console is spaced. Saved on this device.
display.landingHint: The page you see right after you sign in.
display.densityHint: Compact tightens spacing across the whole console.

language.title: Language
language.description: The language for menus and labels. Saved in your browser.

wiring.title: Workflow wiring
wiring.description: The n8n webhook each Growth-Engine stage fires. Leave a field empty to use the environment default.

n8n.title: n8n connection
n8n.description: How the ERP reaches n8n to read live execution status.

ingest.title: Ingest security
ingest.description: n8n uses this token to write results back to the ERP.
ingest.revertConfirm: Revert to the env ingest token? n8n must use the ARSENAL_INGEST_TOKEN value again.
ingest.revertToast: Reverted to the env ingest token.
ingest.copyError: Could not copy — select and copy it manually.
ingest.dialogDescription: Copy this now — it's shown once. Paste it into n8n's “ERP Ingest” credential (header x-arsenal-token). The ERP stores only a hash.

cadence.title: Cadence & sender
cadence.description: The default sending alias and how the sequence is spaced.
cadence.followupLabel: First follow-up — days after first email

templates.title: Templates
templates.description: The baseline outreach copy the sequence sends. Leave blank to send nothing.

leads.title: Leads
leads.description: How Lead Satellite hunts and how outreach is paced.
leads.regionsHelper: Regions Lead Satellite targets by default.
leads.respectSuppressionsHelper: Skip addresses on your do-not-contact list.
leads.requireNicheAnalysisHelper: Require a niche analysis before Lead Satellite hunts.

dailySend.title: Daily send
dailySend.description: An extra daily Reach Bazooka send fired by the ERP.

catalogs.title: Managed catalogs
catalogs.description: Jump to the lists that drive your workspace.
catalogs.nichesDescription: Define the niches and target archetypes campaigns expand.
catalogs.suppressionsDescription: Your do-not-contact list — addresses outreach skips.

save.invalidWebhook: {label}: enter a valid URL (or clear it to use the env default).
save.invalidApiUrl: n8n API URL: enter a valid URL (or clear it to use the env default).
save.invalidCadence: Cadence days must be a whole number of 0 or more.
save.invalidLeadCap: Lead limits must be a whole number of 0 or more.
